items.name: WWII Croix de Guerre
items.description:
The Croix de Guerre is a French military decoration created during World War I to recognize acts of bravery in combat. Awarded to individuals and units, it is distinguished by bronze or silver stars and palms on the ribbon indicating the level of citation. The medal was revived for later conflicts, including World War II, and became a widely respected symbol of battlefield valor in France and among allied forces.


/prussia
